## Type of change

## Checklist
- [ ] All existing tests pass (`npm test`)
- [ ] New tests added for new behaviour
- [ ] No business logic added (common is cross-cutting only — no DB, no service-specific code)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG` or version bump updated if this is a breaking change
